## Limitations

1078             "1. **Small training set**: " + str(_n_training) + " cases — model may underperform on unseen CVE categories

results.code:
1077             "\n## Limitations\n"
1078             "1. **Small training set**: " + str(_n_training) + " cases \u2014 model may underperform on unseen CVE categories\n"
1079             "2. **Temporal bias**: Training data biased towards 2021-2025 CVEs; emerging attack patterns may not be captured\n"
1080             "3. **No code-level features**: Model uses metadata only; does not analyze actual source code\n"
1081             "4. **Chain exploit detection**: Chain exploit feature is binary; does not model chain complexity\n"
1082             "5. **Asset criticality dependency**: Requires accurate asset_criticality input; garbage-in-garbage-out\n"
1083             "6. **No online learning**: Model is static; requires periodic retraining with updated golden dataset\n"
1084             "\n## Ethical Considerations\n"
1085             "- Model should not be used as sole basis for security decisions\n"
1086             "- False negatives (missed critical vulns) are more dangerous than false positives\n"
1087             "- Model is calibrated to over-predict risk for KEV entries (safety margin)\n"
1088             "\n## Update Policy\n"
1089             "- Retrain when golden dataset updated with >5 new cases\n"
1090             "- Retrain when validation accuracy drops >5% from baseline\n"
1091             "- Model version is bumped for any hyperparameter change\n"
1092         )
